name: Soyas
description: Specialized Solana infrastructure provider delivering SWQoS-powered fast transaction landing via private QUIC endpoints and high-velocity Shredstream data feeds. Built for trading platforms, bots, and memecoin developers that need ultra-low latency.

tx_landing.description: Fast transaction landing service with private QUIC endpoints and whitelisted access. Tips-based model, no subscription required.
tx_landing.note: No registration needed for TX landing. Access is whitelisted via Telegram contact.

shredstream.description: Ultra-low latency Solana shreds delivered directly to your infrastructure. Perfect for MEV, trading, and high-frequency applications.

api_key.format: Base58-encoded Ed25519 keypair (32-byte seed or 64-byte secret key)
api_key.how_to_get: Contact @matt_soyas on Telegram. Admin whitelists your Solana public key. You receive a keypair to use as the API key for mutual-TLS authentication.
api_key.auth_mechanism: Mutual TLS via QUIC — the base58-encoded Solana keypair is used to generate a self-signed X.509 certificate for client authentication. Server verifies the public key is whitelisted.

tip_wallet_note: Each VersionedTransaction must carry a System Program transfer to one of these addresses.
tip_note: Each VersionedTransaction must carry a System Program transfer >= 0.001 SOL (1,000,000 lamports) to one of the tip addresses.
cost_on_failure: Tips-based model — tip is a System Program transfer instruction inside the transaction. If the transaction does not land, no tip is paid.

data_centers.note: The live endpoints table adds a Frankfurt 2 (fra2) region with a per-region data-center column (Teraswitch / Allnodes).

web_api.note: Web dashboard API for Shredstream subscription management, not for transaction submission.

rate_limits.tx_landing: Per-key rate limit configured by admin (rate_limit_per_sec). Default may be unlimited (shown as infinity symbol). Contact Telegram for details.
rate_limits.note: Rate limits are set per API public key by admin. Burst limits also configurable.

send_transaction.description: Send a signed Solana transaction (VersionedTransaction) to Soyas for fast landing via SWQoS-powered QUIC connection.
send_transaction.input: Raw wire bytes of a signed Solana transaction (bincode-serialized VersionedTransaction)
send_transaction.encoding: Binary (raw transaction bytes, not base58/base64 encoded)
send_transaction.behavior: Opens a new QUIC unidirectional stream per transaction. Auto-reconnects on write failure.
requirements: Transaction must include a System Program transfer >= 0.001 SOL to one of the 10 tip wallets
API key (Solana keypair) must be whitelisted

connect.description: Establish a persistent QUIC connection to a Soyas ingress endpoint using mutual-TLS with a whitelisted Solana keypair.

api_key.description: Base58-encoded Solana keypair (32-byte seed or 64-byte secret key)

connect.auth_check: 300ms timeout — connection is verified immediately after establishment. If rejected, the server closes the connection.

encoding.tls: Mutual TLS 1.3 with self-signed X.509 certificate derived from Solana keypair

swqos.description: Stake-Weighted Quality of Service — transactions are prioritized based on validator stake for deterministic performance.

quic_transport.description: Private QUIC endpoints (not HTTP/JSON-RPC). Ultra-low latency binary protocol using solana-tpu ALPN.

whitelisted_access.description: Access controlled via whitelisted Solana public keys. Mutual TLS authentication ensures only authorized clients can connect.

auto_reconnect.description: Client libraries automatically reconnect on write failures. Go client is goroutine-safe with shared QUIC connection.

tips_based_model.description: No subscription required for TX landing. Pay-per-transaction via SOL tips included in each transaction.

global_edge_network.description: High-performance nodes in 5 regions: Frankfurt, Amsterdam, New York, London, Tokyo.

low_latency.description: Optimized for Solana MEV and high-frequency trading. Sub-millisecond propagation for maximum speed.

native_web3_payments.description: Scale infrastructure instantly with seamless SOL payments. Self-service onboarding.

shredstream.description: Direct access to Solana shreds with minimal latency. Ultra-low latency Turbine stream with global region support and RPC node compatible streaming.

multi_language_sdks.rust: Native quinn/QUIC client with solana-sdk integration

best_practices: Include tip transfer instruction (>= 0.001 SOL) to one of the 10 tip wallets in every transaction
Use the closest regional endpoint to minimize latency
Client connections auto-reconnect on failure — safe to share across threads/goroutines
Contact @matt_soyas on Telegram to get your public key whitelisted
For Shredstream: free 1-day trial available, then 8 SOL/month/region
